title: lib
description:
- The lib directory contains libraries that are used by multiple MapReduce applications.
- The libraries are divided into subdirectories based on their functionality.
- The subdirectories collaborate to provide a comprehensive set of libraries for MapReduce applications.
- The lib directory follows the architectural pattern of the Hadoop framework.
